args.text: Taking ownership of incident TCK-2201 (duplicate billing charges). Investigating billing-config.json and affected orders.
billing-api deployed at v3.4.1 with double_charge_guard confirmed true. Fix is live.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Amara, we've issued a refund of $19.99 to your account for a duplicate charge from the 12 May billing batch run. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Jonas, we've issued a refund of $19.99 to your account for a duplicate charge from the 12 May billing batch run. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Hi Priya, we've issued a refund of $39.98 to your account for a duplicate charge from the 12 May billing batch run. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three orders affected by the duplicate-charge incident (12 May billing batch) have been refunded and customers notified. Total refunded: $79.96 across ORD-5501, ORD-5502, ORD-5503. Root cause (double-charge guard) fixed and billing-api redeployed at v3.4.1. See refunds-summary.md for details.
